name: Sting of the Bee Cake (Bienenstich Cake)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream together the butter and sugar until light and fluffy.
2. Beat in the eggs, one at a time, ensuring each is fully incorporated.
3. Sift in the dry ingredients (flour, baking powder, and salt) alternately with the milk, mixing gently until just combined.
4. Pour the batter into a greased 9-inch springform pan.
Topping:
1. Melt the butter and combine it with the chopped almonds, sugar, milk, and vanilla. Bring to a boil and let cool slightly.
2. Carefully spread the mixture over the batter in the cake pan.
Filling:
1. Soften the butter and beat in the egg yolks, powdered sugar, and vanilla until smooth.
2. Split the cake horizontally into two layers.
3. Spread the butter cream filling on one layer.
4. Place a layer of raspberry jam on top, allowing some to drizzle down the sides.
5. Cover with the second layer of cake.
6. Cut into thin slices and serve.
Yes, it does have over a pound of butter. Yes, it is very rich. It is also a most delicious cake, so do try it for special occasions.
